transcriptLines: MAY CONTAIN PEANUT AND TREE NUTS.

transcriptLines: MANUFACTURED ON SHARED EQUIPMENT WITH FISH.

transcriptLines: PROCESSED IN A FACILITY WITH WHEAT AND SOY.
